name: YouTube Research Kit
tagline: Extract metadata, transcripts, and comments from any YouTube video — no API key needed
description: A complete YouTube content research toolkit for AI agents. Extract video metadata (title, stats, tags, thumbnails), download subtitles/transcripts in any language, retrieve top comments sorted by popularity, analyze playlists and channels — all powered by yt-dlp locally. Perfect for content creators, researchers, and anyone who needs structured YouTube data for analysis, summarization, or content planning.
